title: Cool Vanilla Vibes
description: It is a vanilla+ Modpack in Fabric that will enhance vanilla without being overwhelming! It will have some nice simple mods to give a cozy feel!
body:
# Summary
This is a vanilla+ Modpack in Fabric that will enhance vanilla without adding too much content (allowing for this to be used on Vanilla Servers!). Containing mods like [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) and [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) to enhance the server-side performance for smaller SMPs. Many of the same mods from other optimization packs, such as [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), are included to make sure that the client-side performance is at a better level than default Minecraft, so no large lag spikes cause issues! 

If you need a well performing modpack with more capabilities than most others, this is your go-to!

# Performance and Features
Thanks to many hours of playtesting, and being based off my personal modpack, this modpack is designed to be decently performing, and contain Optifine Parity with CIT, Zoom, Shaders, and Dynamic Lighting included! PVP and QOL related features have been included as well, such as Health Indicators, Litematica, and Controlify! Other mods such as Essential and e4mc are added for better gameplay with friends.

More QOL mods included are [BoatCam](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/boatcam), Language Reload, and 3D Skin Layers to allow for more fun! Language Reload allows for faster switches between all included languages, while BoatCam has a toggle to smooth the camera while riding boats to not be too annoying to use!

# Updates
As I tend to update this modpack when the new versions are released, this pack will update at roughly the same rate, with 1.21.3 being my next goal and 1.21.4 soon after as all the mods are updated.
